data.title: Trump Tariffs Spark $800M Crypto ETF Rout: Can The Macro Narrative Shift?
data.description: Trump fancies himself a crypto-friendly president, but his trade tariffs slammed the most well-known crypto-linked ETFs.

data.title: A WallStreetBets Investor Says '30 Years Of Globalization Has Ended.' Now They're Asking, 'How Bad Will The Bear Market Be?'
Why Singapore Outpaces Hong Kong In Attracting Crypto Operators...
data.description: As of 2024, Hong Kong has only seven fully licensed crypto exchanges, in stark contrast to Singapore's 13 MPI licenses. Here's why.

data.title: Why Is XRP Up Today? Teucrium's 2x ETF And Rebound In Risk Appetite Spark Rally
data.description: XRP (CRYPTO: XRP) surged more than 11% Tuesday to trade at $1.95, clawing back losses from Monday's tariff-driven sell-off as optimism over potential U.S. trade negotiations lifted sentiment across risk assets.

data.title: Death Cross Alert: Alphabet Stock Drops The Signal, Bears Pick It Up
data.description: Alphabet stock (GOOGL/GOOG) is forming a Death Cross, signaling a downtrend. Technicals are bearish with oversold RSI and negative MACD. Market unsettled by ad woes, tariffs, and antitrust concerns.
